theme_archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical/Gaming Variant) - Pure Dark Theme
instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use valid i18n translation keys via react-i18next (e.g., t('hero.title')) for ALL text.
Do not alter existing app routes or authenticated views.
Apply data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based) to all interactive and key elements.
Use framer-motion for all scroll, entrance, and complex hover animations.
Do NOT use placeholder image services like via.placeholder.com.
Rely entirely on pure HTML/Tailwind CSS and Recharts to build the dashboard mockups (NO raster stock photos for the UI).

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter uppercase
scales.h2: text-base md:text-lg font-bold tracking-wide uppercase text-white

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Tactical HUD aesthetic. High density in product mockups, generous breathing room (p-12 to p-24) between major marketing sections.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Always 1px solid, rarely shadowed. Use inner glows or left-border accents for emphasis.

grid_strategy.marketing_sections: Tetris Grid / Asymmetrical blocks for visual tension.
grid_strategy.product_mockups: Control Room Grid, highly dense, no gaps (gap-0) or strict 1px grid borders.

css_utilities.btn-volt: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#E5FF00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all hover:bg-[#F0FF4D] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(229,255,0,0.3)]
css_utilities.btn-outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center border border-[#2A2A35] bg-transparent text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all hover:bg-[#1A1A24] hover:border-white
css_utilities.panel-hud: bg-[#0F0F12] border border-[#1A1A24] rounded-none relative overflow-hidden

product_mockup_build_guides.health_score: Use an SVG <circle> with strokeDasharray and strokeDashoffset. Animate offset from 0 to target (e.g., 98). Use #00FF66 for the stroke color. Place large font-mono text '98' in the center.
product_mockup_build_guides.fps_chart: Use Recharts <AreaChart>. Data should simulate a jump from 120 FPS to 180 FPS. Use a glowing #00FF66 stroke and a <linearGradient> for the fill. Hide axes for a clean HUD look.
product_mockup_build_guides.ai_advisor_chat: Pure HTML/Tailwind. Stacked DIVs. Left aligned grey text for user, right aligned cyan text for AI. Use framer-motion to stagger their appearance. Add a 'typing...' indicator.
product_mockup_build_guides.price_tracker: Mini Recharts <LineChart> with a descending line. Stroke color #00E0FF. Add a dashed reference line for 'Target Price'.
product_mockup_build_guides.desktop_agent_terminal: A black DIV with a top bar (red, yellow, green pure CSS dots). Content: font-mono text in green #00FF66 simulating typing: '> Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://boostpc.app/run" -UseBasicParsing | Invoke-Expression'.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.layout: Fixed top, backdrop-blur-md bg-[#050505]/80, border-b border-[#1A1A24].
sections.content: Logo (left), Language Switcher 🇮🇹/🇬🇧 + Sign In + Get Started 'btn-volt' (right).

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Grid cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[90vh] p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden. Use 'grid-bg' class on absolute background container with low opacity.
sections.content_left: Micro-label: '// AI PERFORMANCE COMMAND CENTER'. H1: 'BOOST YOUR PC. OWN THE STREAM.' Body: Explain the core value. CTAs: Primary 'btn-volt', Secondary 'btn-outline'.
sections.content_right: The 'Actual Product Preview'. A composite HUD built with 'panel-hud' containers overlapping. Must include the animated Health Score SVG, real-time looking telemetry numbers (CPU 45°C), and the rising FPS Recharts graph. Wrap in framer-motion floating animation.

sections.name: Trust Strip
sections.layout: Grid cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 border-y border-[#1A1A24] bg-[#050505]. Every item has border-r border-[#1A1A24] except the last.
sections.content: Animated counters (framer-motion or pure react hooks). Stats: +15 FPS avg, 26 tweaks, 5 stores tracked, 100% reversible. Font: mono.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.layout: py-24 px-8. Header centered: '// DEPLOYMENT PROTOCOL'. Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8.
sections.content: 3 steps. 1: Connect PC (icon: Plug). 2: AI Analyzes (icon: Cpu). 3: Apply Boosts (icon: Zap). Hover state: Add a left-border that highlights in #E5FF00.

sections.name: Features Showcase (5 Rows)
sections.layout: py-24. 5 distinct rows. Alternate layout: Row 1 (Text Left / Mockup Right), Row 2 (Mockup Left / Text Right), etc.

features.title: Build Generator
features.mockup_guide: Sleek list of components (CPU, GPU, RAM) with lucide icons and checkmarks simulating an AI selection process.

sections.name: Closing CTA
sections.layout: py-32 px-8 text-center relative border-y border-[#2A2A35] bg-[#0F0F12].
sections.content: H2: 'READY TO OWN THE STREAM?'. Subtitle. Big 'btn-volt' CTA. Decorative corner brackets [ ] in absolute positioning.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: py-16 px-8 grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-12 bg-[#050505].
sections.content: Col 1: Logo + short bio. Col 2/3: Links (Product, Legal). Col 4: Language Switcher and status indicator (All systems operational in green).

seo_and_meta.title: BoostPC - AI Performance Command Center
seo_and_meta.description: Optimize your PC for gaming and streaming with AI. Real-time telemetry, auto-tweaks, and hardware price tracking.
seo_and_meta.open_graph_advice: Ensure the OG image is a snapshot of the dark tactical HUD (Hero mockup). Set theme-color meta tag to #050505.
